<!-- indicator: fig-uc-impact-hlthinsur-access -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-uc-impact-hlthinsur-access
#| fig-cap: 'The Impact of Health Insurance Coverage & Access to Care in Ulster County (n = 66)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing The Impact of Health Insurance Coverage & Access to Care in Ulster County (n = 66).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-uc-impact-hlthinsur-access", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
